name: Aletheia DAC — sensor→embedding→decision with drift gate

parameters.command: python3 -m aletheia.cli issue --db /data/aletheia.db --kind sensor_reading --producer sensor.l0 --classification REGULATED --confidence 0.99 --alpha 0.01 --monitor stream_A --payload "hr=88"

nodes.name: Issue Sensor DAC
nodes.notes: Emits {id,...}. Parse stdout as JSON in the next Set/Code node and capture id.

parameters.jsCode:
const out = JSON.parse($json["stdout"]);
return [{ json: { sensor_id: out.id } }];

parameters.command: =python3 -m aletheia.cli derive --db /data/aletheia.db --kind embedding --producer enc.l2 --classification INTERNAL --confidence 0.92 --alpha 0.08 --method split_conformal --parents {{ $json["sensor_id"] }} --payload "vec"

nodes.name: Verify Audit Chain
nodes.notes: Gate: if chain_ok=false, stop and alert (tamper).

comment: Import via n8n > Workflows > Import from File. Requires `pip install -e .` so `python3 -m aletheia.cli` is on PATH in the n8n host/container. Mount a writable /data volume for the SQLite store. A scheduled DriftMonitor job calls `... cli trip --monitor stream_A` when a stream shift is detected; downstream DACs cascade to STALE automatically.
